topic: How small teams can use AI responsibly for social content
summary: Small teams benefit most when AI supports a measured workflow with human accountability, explicit policies, and reviewable evidence.
key_points: Keep a human responsible for final publication.
Measure quality and failures with a fixed evaluation set.
audience_insights: Founders need a workflow that is quick to adopt and easy to audit.
content_angles: A three-step checklist for responsible AI-assisted content.
risks: Model output may contain unsupported claims.
source_notes: Prepared from supplied context and general model knowledge; no live web research was performed.
